problem: Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear
hypothesis: If Casimir effect between nanoscale surfaces is applied to ionic, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Bench-top proof of concept with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
